content.en:
Rumble!!!

The Divine Source Crystal Statue was completely shattered, but the shattered Divine Origin Crystal did not scatter in all directions, but turned into streams of energy and poured into the interior of the Divine Source Crystal Stone Statue.

The next moment, a figure appeared on Ye Tian's body.

"Protoss!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

The figure in front of him was a god-level Protoss, and although there were countless green dots on his body, the aura and golden lines of the Protoss had not dissipated.

Obviously, this Protoss is the nobleman of the Protoss, the Golden-Striped Protoss!

"How can there be a Protoss here, is it ......?"

Ye Tian thought of a possibility, that is, this Protoss was also the Protoss Highness who entered the Yuan Gu Palace, but unfortunately he failed when he broke through the death-level difficulty, and then stayed here.

At this time.

This Protoss opened his eyes and looked at Ye Tian.

"Another one!"

The Protoss spoke.

"Are you conscious?"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised, he thought that this Protoss was similar to a puppet, but he didn't expect that he was self-aware.

"You think I'm a puppet?" the Protoss suddenly laughed, "I naturally have consciousness, but I am not the previous Protoss, and the consciousness of the previous Protoss has been completely transformed into my current consciousness. If you are defeated by me, you will also be invaded by the curse Gu poison, transform your consciousness, and become a poisonous person in the death-level difficulty assessment of the Ancient Palace! As a poisonous person, I have self-awareness, so I don't want to die, so I can only defeat you as much as possible, or even kill you!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The body of this Protoss is the corpse of the previous Protoss, but the consciousness is a completely new consciousness.

Therefore, strictly speaking, the poisonous person in front of him is a living being, and his lifespan is limited, so he needs to be sealed, and he can't come out at ordinary times, and he will only appear when someone breaks through the death-level difficulty assessment.

At this time, he finally knew what the green substance was.

"Curse Gu Poison!"

Ye Tian was very jealous of this kind of curse poison, this was a curse poison that could even change his consciousness!

He doesn't want to become like this god, if his self-consciousness changes, it is equivalent to another person, and he is equivalent to death!

Swish!

The Protoss poisoner rushed over and punched him.

Although this Protoss has been transformed into a poisonous person, his combat power has not decreased too much, and the Protoss who dares to break through the death-level difficulty will not be too weak, at least it is also the first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness, otherwise he will not dare to break through the death-level difficulty at all.

It's a pity that this Protoss still overestimated his strength at the beginning, and fell on the death-level difficulty, and now he has become a poisonous person for others to assess, which is extremely sad!

"Sky Moon Knife!"

Ye Tian slashed over with a knife, directly slashing this god poison man into the air, and even left a knife mark on the other party's body, almost piercing it.

"It's not strong, it's just equivalent to a first-grade Eternal Ancient-level Highness!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But soon, Ye Tian was a little dignified, and he saw that the wound of this god clan poisoner was covered by green substance, and he quickly recovered.

Obviously, this curse poison also has the effect of healing wounds, of course, it is limited to poisonous people.

Next, Ye Tian didn't really attack with all his might, but tested the strength and methods of this poisonous man again and again, so as to understand the poisonous man, so that he could deal with other poisonous people in the future.

He believed that among the death-level difficulties, there should be more than one poisoner, otherwise, the more powerful first-grade Eternal Ancient Highness would also have a great hope of breaking through the death-level difficulty, so the death-level difficulty would be too low.

After more than ten minutes, Ye Tian almost understood the situation of the Protoss poisoner.

To put it simply, the Protoss Poisoner can't perfectly exert its previous combat power, but the curse Gu poison of the body can spread to the enemy with the attack, and once you are broken by the poisoner, it will be dangerous.

For example, Ye Tian, if he is invaded by the curse Gu poison, he must spend his strength to suppress the curse Gu poison, and his strength cannot be exerted, he will slowly become weak, and finally lose to the poison person's body.

Therefore, you must protect your body from being invaded by the curse poison, otherwise you will be easily defeated.

After understanding the same, Ye Tian no longer kept his hand.

"Die!"

The time stagnation was cast, which instantly made the thinking of the Protoss poisoner extremely slow, and Ye Tian cast the Tianyue Knife several times in an instant, directly killing the Protoss poisoner, and his body turned into a large amount of curse Gu poison and scattered, and flew towards the distance.

It is clear that a second poisoner is about to appear.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over, and soon saw another statue of the Divine Source Crystal.

Soon, this Divine Source Crystal statue also shattered, and another poisonous man appeared.

This poisonous man is a god-level of the Yaksha Clan, and he is the royal family of the Yaksha Clan, the Void Yaksha, who is good at spatial talent, and his body is naturally in line with space, even better at space than the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan.

The Yaksha is also an old cosmic clan, and it has been much longer than the rise of the human race.

In addition to the two super clans of the Protoss and the Demon Race, among the many major clans in the universe, the Yaksha Clan is enough to rank in the top ten, while the Terran Race can only rank in the top 100.

However, after all, the background of the Yaksha clan is far inferior to the god race and the demon race, and this Yaksha god level should be much stronger than the previous god poison man, but it is a pity that such a highness fell to the death level difficulty and was transformed into a poison person, and the original Yaksha clan is estimated to be extremely distressed.

"You're good at being able to defeat the first poisoner!"

The face of the Yaksha Clan's poisonous man was solemn, he had self-awareness, so he naturally didn't want to disappear, and Ye Tian was able to kill the first poisonous person, and his strength was not weak, so he was also worried that he was not an opponent.

But the rules of the Yuan Gu Hall restrained him, and he had to make a move.

Swish!

The Yaksha poison man spread his wings behind his back, and his body disappeared in an instant.

"Space Power!"

Ye Tian turned on the spatial talent and sensed the surroundings, when this Yaksha appeared not far behind Ye Tian, holding a spear and piercing it, Ye Tian immediately teleported away, letting go and slashing through the spatial blade with a single blow.

"Hmph, just an arcane-level spatial talent, and you want to hide it from me?"

Ye Tian secretly sneered.

Next, this Yaksha poisoner was suppressed by Ye Tian everywhere in the manipulation of spatial power, and he was not an opponent at all in other aspects.

In terms of strength, this Yaksha poison is equivalent to the top first-grade Eternal Highness, and he is not very far from the invincible Eternal Ancient Highness's combat power.

It's a pity that Ye Tian is a supreme-level highness, and he is the top supreme-level highness, this Yaksha poison is naturally far from being an opponent, and he is completely teased by Ye Tian.

After fighting for about a few minutes, Ye Tian lost interest and quickly killed this Yaksha poisoner.

It didn't take long for a third poisoner to appear.

But this time, the poisonous man is not a certain intelligent race, but a huge monster, whose strength is comparable to that of the invincible Henggu-level His Highness, and it should be a monster made up by the Yuangu Palace.

After all, the number of poisonous people is limited, and the powerful poisonous people are even rarer, and the poisonous people who lack assessment can only use substitutes.

This monster didn't have much intelligence, only pure strength and attack, but it was far from Ye Tian's opponent, and was quickly killed by Ye Tian.

Just then, a voice rang out.

"Assessor, next, you only need to defeat the last poison man, and you can pass the death-level difficulty!"

When Ye Tian heard this voice, he knew that it was the instrument spirit of the Yuan Gu Palace.

"Is it the last one?"

Ye Tian did not relax at all, and remained vigilant.

Eventually, he came to the place where the last poisoner was.

There is no Divine Source Crystal here, but a green egg!
